extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO attacked on final climb of Green Mountain with teammate LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel, LÓPEZ won stage while LUTSENKO took race lead by 11 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Astana deployed dual GC threats LUTSENKO and LÓPEZ on final climb, forcing rivals to chase both instead of marking one.
MARCATO drove breakaway tempo for UAE Emirates despite no team interest, weakening peloton before Astana's final move.
Rally Cycling placed two riders in break then CARPENTER extended effort on lower climb slopes, unusual persistence pattern.

rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: riding supreme with LUTSENKO on Green Mountain, won stage while positioned 11 seconds behind in GC
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: riding supreme on final climb, took race lead with 11 seconds over LÓPEZ after stage, perfect Astana tactics
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: in difficulty on Green Mountain climb, limiting losses as expected non-climber terrain
rider_signals.HIRT Jan: negative: dropped after tremendous workload for Astana, sacrificial domestique burned before summit finish
rider_signals.CARPENTER Robin: neutral: winner Tour of Alberta, held front on lower slopes before peloton absorption
rider_signals.MARCATO Marco: neutral: drove breakaway tempo for UAE Emirates, key domestique role weakening peloton before catch
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Gorka: positive: third overall, 11 seconds behind LUTSENKO after Green Mountain stage
